EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.name} modified the resource internal event "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} is viewing information about the resource internal event "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} viewed information about the resource internal event "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} failed to delete resource internal events on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}".
The user {subject.name} failed to view information about the resource internal event "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}".
The user {subject.name} is viewing information about resource internal events on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} failed to modify a resource internal event on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}".
The user {subject.name} is creating the resource internal event "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} deleted resource internal events on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} failed to delete the resource internal event "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}".
The user {subject.name} is deleting the resource internal event "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} viewed information about resource internal events on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} deleted the resource internal event "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} failed to create a resource internal event on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}".
The user {subject.name} created the resource internal event "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} failed to view information about resource internal events on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}".
The user {subject.name} is modifying the resource internal event "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} is deleting resource internal events on host {event_src.host}
